<!--
Thanks for contributing to gpt-image-2-for-e-commerce!
中文贡献者也可以用中文写 PR 描述,这个模板填英文/中文都行。
-->

## What & Why
<!-- One or two sentences. What is changing, and what's the user-visible benefit? -->

## Type of change
<!-- Tick the one that fits best. -->

- [ ] New prompt case (listing photo / model try-on / product showcase / interaction scene / social commerce)
- [ ] Update existing prompt case (refined prompt / better example image / fixed typo)
- [ ] Translation update (zh-CN, zh-TW, ja, ko, es, pt, de, fr, ru, tr) or new language
- [ ] Documentation only (Quick Start / Batch API / README structure)
- [ ] Other

---

### If this PR adds or updates a prompt case

- [ ] Added input image and at least one output example under `e-commerce/CaseN/`
- [ ] Prompt uses `{placeholders}` for product, language, country, platform, and selling points
- [ ] Stated the target scenario (platform / market / SKU type) in the case heading or NOTE block
- [ ] Confirmed the example images are owned by you or released under a license compatible with CC BY 4.0

### If this PR is a translation update

- [ ] Synced from the latest `README.md` (English is the source of truth)
- [ ] Kept all section anchors and case numbers identical to the English README
- [ ] Updated the language-switcher badge row if a new language is being added

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Every Evolink link uses `utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=gpt-image-2-for-e-commerce`
- [ ] No private drafts, personal screenshots, or unrelated files included
- [ ] Tested the prompt at least once on GPT Image 2 and verified the output matches the example
